name: Ladakh Bike Expedition – Hanle & Umling La
highlights: Umling La – World's Highest Motorable Road
inclusions: Parking, toll taxes & fuel for backup vehicle

itinerary.title: Arrival – Leh
itinerary.description: Arrive Leh, acclimatization rest at 3★ Deluxe Hotel.

itinerary.title: Leh Local Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Shanti Stupa, Leh Palace, Leh Market, Magnetic Hill.

itinerary.title: Leh → Nubra Valley
itinerary.description: Ride over Khardung La Pass (18,380 ft), descend to Nubra Valley. Check-in Deluxe Camp/Cottage.

itinerary.title: Nubra Valley → Pangong Lake
itinerary.description: Hunder Sand Dunes & Bactrian camels, ride to iconic Pangong Tso. Camp stay.

itinerary.title: Pangong Lake → Hanle
itinerary.description: Morning at the lake, ride south to Hanle. Check-in Deluxe Homestay.

itinerary.title: Hanle → Umling La → Hanle
itinerary.description: Ride to Umling La (19,300 ft), one of the world's highest motorable roads. Stargazing at Hanle Dark Sky Reserve.

itinerary.title: Hanle → Leh
itinerary.description: Return journey to Leh. Group dinner & certificates.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, airport/station drop, departure from Leh.

faqs.a: 12 adults on 6 bikes (2 riders per bike).
Yes, all required permits are included.
